pairs.question: What is the episode number and title of the 22nd episode of Modern Family's second season?
pairs.answer: The episode is titled 'Good Cop Bad Dog' and is the 22nd episode of Modern Family's second season.

pairs.question: When did 'Good Cop Bad Dog' originally air on ABC?
pairs.answer: 'Good Cop Bad Dog' originally aired on May 11, 2011.

pairs.question: Who wrote and guest directed the episode 'Good Cop Bad Dog'?
pairs.answer: The episode was written by Abraham Higginbotham and Jeffrey Richman, and was guest directed by former child star Fred Savage.

pairs.question: What role did Lin-Manuel Miranda play in 'Good Cop Bad Dog'?
pairs.answer: Lin-Manuel Miranda guest starred as Guillermo, the Grocery Store worker who tries to convince Jay to invest with him.

pairs.question: What are the main plot points involving Jay, Phil, and Claire in 'Good Cop Bad Dog'?
pairs.answer: Jay advises a dog trainer, while Phil and Claire switch parenting duties, much to the kids' dismay.

pairs.question: How did Mitchell and Cameron's storyline unfold in this episode?
pairs.answer: Mitchell had an extra Lady Gaga ticket when Cameron ended up sick.

pairs.question: What was the critical reception and viewership for 'Good Cop Bad Dog'?
pairs.answer: The episode received positive reviews, with many praising Ty Burrell's performance. It was viewed by over 10 million viewers and received a 4.2 rating/11% share in the 18–49 demographic, marking an 8% rise in ratings from the previous episode. It was also the highest-rated scripted program of the original week among adults aged 18 to 49.

pairs.question: What award did Ty Burrell eventually receive for his performance in this episode?
pairs.answer: Ty Burrell eventually received an Emmy for his performance in 'Good Cop Bad Dog'.
